This storm is fascinating! At 2am Tuesday morning according to the most recent updates on The Weather Channel app. Milton will have 185MPH winds. To put this in perspective Hurricane categories increase 26 mph. So Category 4 is 130 to 156mph winds. A category 5 is 157+. If you add 26mph it would take it to 183mph winds. So at 2am if there were such a thing as a Category 6 Hurricane at 184 to 209mph winds Milton would be it and I've never seen such a thing! Incredible! Be safe everyone!

faster the storm upgrades the quicker the eye wall has to re build... this is what we are hoping for.. how fast it upgraded plus the eye wall rebuild plus the wind shear equals the decrease in the upgrade before hitting land.. ALL prayers and protection for all of us
